name: workflow-skills
description: Project development workflow skills for code audit, issue fixes, feature delivery, and code shipping.

interface.shortDescription: Code audit, fix, feature delivery, and ship workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Workflow Skills to guide code audits, issue-driven fixes, feature delivery, and shipping with commit messages, PR summaries, and release notes.
defaultPrompt: Use Workflow Skills when auditing code, fixing issues, implementing features, or preparing to ship.
